title: Team Structure & Capability Map
IMPORTANT: This file describes the roles this venture REQUIRES, not people it has. Every `holder` field is deliberately null. Fill them with real names and real, verifiable backgrounds. Do not let generated placeholder biographies reach an investor — fabricated team credentials are the fastest way to destroy a fundraise and, depending on jurisdiction, a securities problem.

capability_requirements.title: Chief Executive / Commercial Lead
capability_requirements.why_the_venture_needs_it: Aquaculture technology does not sell itself. Someone has to sit on a dike at 5 a.m. with a farmer who has been burned by a previous gadget vendor and earn the pilot.
critical_skills: Regulatory navigation with CAAP and BFAR
Pricing against loss avoidance rather than feature lists
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: A technically excellent product that nobody buys, because the team optimised the drone instead of the pilot agreement.

capability_requirements.title: Chief Technology Officer / Systems Architect
capability_requirements.why_the_venture_needs_it: This is a hard systems integration problem — aerial vehicle, wet sensing, dispensing, edge inference, cloud, and a twin — and each subsystem's constraints break the others. Someone must own the whole envelope.
critical_skills: The discipline to say no to features that break the payload fraction
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: Four subsystems that each work and a vehicle that cannot fly with all of them attached. This is the single most common way multirotor payload concepts die.

capability_requirements.title: Aquaculture / Limnology Scientist
capability_requirements.why_the_venture_needs_it: The product's claims are scientific claims. Without domain science in-house, the company will confidently ship a chlorophyll index it believes is a toxin detector.
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: Overclaiming. The company's entire moat is trustworthiness of measurement, and this role is the person who defends it internally against the sales pressure to just say the score predicts kills.
capability_requirements.note: In the Philippine context, SEAFDEC/AQD, UP Visayas, and state universities with fisheries programmes are the obvious recruiting and collaboration grounds.

capability_requirements.title: Remote Sensing / Machine Learning Lead
capability_requirements.why_the_venture_needs_it: Radiometric calibration, glint handling, and inland-water retrieval are specialist skills. A generalist ML engineer will produce a model that performs beautifully on the training lake and collapses on the next one.
critical_skills: Computer vision for small-object detection over water
Model calibration and uncertainty quantification — not just accuracy
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: Uncalibrated indices presented as measurements, which produces a time series that looks like science and is not.

capability_requirements.title: Embedded / Flight Systems Engineer
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: A vehicle whose link-loss behaviour was designed for land and which therefore ditches in a lake the first time a squall rolls in.

capability_requirements.title: Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineer
capability_requirements.why_the_venture_needs_it: The winch is the hardest mechanism on the vehicle and the most novel. It must pay out and recover a wet, fouling, snagging sensor from a moving hover in wind, thousands of times, without a person present.
critical_skills: Design for field maintenance by non-engineers
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: A winch that works in the lab and jams over water, which is an unrecoverable failure with a drone on the far side of a lake.

capability_requirements.title: Platform / Full-Stack Engineer
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: A cloud platform that assumes connectivity that rural aquaculture sites do not have.

capability_requirements.title: Field Operations / Remote Pilot
critical_skills: Maintenance in the field with limited tooling
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: No pilot certificate means no legal commercial flight. This is a hard gate, not a nice-to-have.

capability_requirements.title: Regulatory & Quality Lead
capability_requirements.why_the_venture_needs_it: The business model depends on a BVLOS authorisation the company does not have. Someone must own that pathway from day one, because it has a long lead time and it gates the unit economics.
capability_requirements.failure_mode_if_absent: A company that discovers in year three that its entire margin assumed an operating mode it is not permitted to use.

advisory_needs.rationale: Site-specific water column behaviour is not generalisable from temperate literature. Taal, Laguna de Bay, Buhi, and Sampaloc each behave differently.
Distribution to smallholders runs through cooperatives and extension networks, not through direct sales.
Anything involving medicine dispensing crosses into regulated veterinary territory. See regulatory-framework.json.
Smallholders cannot buy capital equipment. The financing structure is as much of a product decision as the hardware.

org_evolution.note: Modeled hiring shape, not a commitment.

phases.focus: Requirements, research, first prototype, first farmer conversations. No sales.
Flying integrated vehicle. First real water data. Validation study design with an academic partner.
Instrumented pilots on real farms. Model training on real data. CAAP BVLOS application.
Service delivery, dock network, support. Field ops becomes the biggest function — this surprises hardware founders every time.

cultural_commitments: The scientist has a veto on public claims. If the science lead says the model is not ready, it does not ship, and the commercial lead does not get to overrule that.
Field time is mandatory for engineers. An engineer who has never stood on a fish cage at dawn will design for a pond that does not exist.
Post-mortems on lost aircraft are blameless and published internally. A team that hides crashes learns nothing and repeats them.
